creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 243429
Use capstone 5.0.0

Currently qemu-cheri is using capstone3 which is the legacy version of capstone. However it builds perfectly with the latest capstone 5.0.0. So change the LIB_DEPENDS accordingly.

Build logs:
https://pkg.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/qemu-cheri/0.d20230224_1/
